description: Authentication failed due to invalid credentials or expired session token.
common_causes: Invalid username, password, or security token
Session timeout or OAuth token expiration
resolution: Verify credentials, refresh OAuth token, or reset security token and update integration configuration.

description: API request rate limit exceeded for the current time window.
common_causes: Too many API calls made within short time period
Concurrent requests exceeding account tier limits
resolution: Implement exponential backoff retry logic and reduce request frequency to stay within rate limits.

description: RFC connection failed due to network or configuration issues
common_causes: Incorrect RFC destination configuration or credentials
resolution: Verify network connectivity, check RFC destination settings, and validate user credentials in SM59.

description: Authentication failed due to invalid credentials or expired session token.
resolution: Verify credentials are correct and regenerate authentication token if using OAuth or API key.

description: Authentication failed due to invalid credentials or expired session token.
common_causes: Invalid username, password, or security token
Expired or revoked OAuth access token
resolution: Verify credentials, regenerate security token, or refresh OAuth token and retry authentication.
